headline: Republic Services (RSG) Stock After 12-Month Decline And DCF Value Gap
summary: If you are wondering whether Republic Services stock offers good value at today's price, this article walks through what the numbers say without the noise. The stock recently closed at US$213.50, with returns of 4.2% over the past week, 3.1% over the past month, 1.6% year to date, and a decline of 11.8% over the last year, set against gains of 46.0% over three years and 105.0% over five years. Recent coverage of Republic Services has focused on ongoing industry demand for waste management...

headline: GreenWaste, CR&R look to enter Los Angeles franchise market
summary: The commercial and multifamily RecycLA program consists of 11 zones and more than 66,000 customers. Existing haulers WM, Republic Services, Athens Services and others also bid on the eight-year contracts.

headline: 1 Profitable Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Find Risky
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies — as Jeff Bezos said, “Your margin is my opportunity”.
